name: AFP ICON
description: The Association of Fundraising Professionals' annual international conference on fundraising, major gifts, and donor relations — the largest gathering of professional fundraisers in North America.

name: Nonprofit Technology Conference (NTC)
description: NTEN's annual Nonprofit Technology Conference on data, fundraising technology, and digital strategy for mission-driven organizations.

name: Council on Foundations Annual Conference
description: The Council on Foundations' annual convening of grantmakers and foundation leaders on the future of institutional philanthropy.

name: Independent Sector Upswell
description: Independent Sector's national gathering of nonprofit and philanthropic leaders on sector policy, equity, and civil society.

name: BoardSource Leadership Forum
description: BoardSource's forum on nonprofit board governance, executive leadership, and organizational strategy.

name: GivingTuesday Summit
description: The GivingTuesday movement's summit for organizers and nonprofits on generosity, grassroots fundraising, and giving campaigns.

name: GEO National Conference
description: Grantmakers for Effective Organizations' conference on smarter grantmaking practices and funder-grantee relationships.

name: ARNOVA Annual Conference
description: The Association for Research on Nonprofit Organizations and Voluntary Action's annual conference bridging nonprofit research and practice.

name: Candid Learning Events
description: Candid's trainings and events on grant research, foundation funding, and nonprofit data for fundraisers and program staff.

name: FreedomFest
description: An annual gathering of free-market and liberty-movement thinkers, donors, and organizations across policy, economics, and civil liberties.

name: State Policy Network Annual Meeting
description: The State Policy Network's annual meeting of state-based think tanks and policy organizations across the liberty movement.

name: LibertyCon
description: Students for Liberty's flagship conference connecting pro-liberty students, nonprofits, and funders on civil liberties and policy.

name: Cato Institute Policy Events
description: The Cato Institute's ongoing policy forums and conferences, including programming on the Fourth Amendment, surveillance, policing, and criminal justice.

name: Federalist Society National Lawyers Convention
description: The Federalist Society's national convention for lawyers and legal scholars on constitutional law, the Fourth Amendment, and the administrative state.

name: Institute for Justice Events
description: The Institute for Justice's convenings on property rights and eminent domain abuse, economic liberty, and constitutional litigation.

name: Innocence Network Conference
description: The Innocence Network's annual conference bringing together exonerees, advocates, and legal teams working to overturn wrongful convictions.

name: NACDL Annual Meeting
description: The National Association of Criminal Defense Lawyers' meeting on criminal defense practice, sentencing reform, and Fourth Amendment litigation.

name: The Sentencing Project Briefings
description: The Sentencing Project's briefings and convenings on mass incarceration, sentencing policy, and criminal legal system reform.

name: Right on Crime Summit
description: Right on Crime's conservative criminal-justice-reform convening on sentencing, reentry, and public safety policy.

name: LEAP Events
description: Law Enforcement Action Partnership events featuring law-enforcement voices for drug-policy and criminal-justice reform.

name: National Alliance to End Homelessness Conference
description: The National Alliance to End Homelessness' national conference on housing-first policy, homelessness services, and prevention.

name: Child Welfare League of America National Conference
description: The Child Welfare League of America's national conference on child welfare policy, foster care, and family services.

name: ACLU Membership Conference
description: The American Civil Liberties Union's membership convening on civil liberties, surveillance, policing, and constitutional rights.

name: Reason Foundation Events
description: Reason Foundation policy events on criminal justice, pretrial reform, and limited-government policy.

name: Nonprofit Finance Fund Events
description: Nonprofit Finance Fund convenings on nonprofit financial health, funding models, and capital for mission-driven organizations.

name: Prosperity Now Summit
description: Prosperity Now's summit on economic mobility, asset building, and financial security for underserved communities.

name: Alliance for Justice Events
description: Alliance for Justice programming on the federal courts, judicial nominations, and access to justice for nonprofits.

name: NCRP Conference
description: The National Committee for Responsive Philanthropy's convenings on equitable, accountable grantmaking and donor practice.
